Brain fade moment and PNG have lost another wicket. Miyagi shortens the length outside off, Hiri steered it backward of square on the off-side, there was never a second run there, but Hiri took on the fielder's arms - the throw is right besides the stumps and the keeper does the rest. full_text: Alei Nao to Simon Ssesazi, Lbw!! Simon Ssesazi has been given OUT . He's reviewed it, has the ball pitched outside leg? Looked pretty adjacent otherwise. Nipped back in and beat Simon Ssesazi's defensive push, onto ball-tracking: It's pitched in line and it's hitting the top of middle and off - three reds and Simon Ssesazi is OUT. Uganda have lost three on the bounce. Just pitched on leg, but that was good enough, held its line and would;'ve been crashing into the stumps.
